title: Conjr
description: Expands the vanilla enchantments with brand-new ones!
body:
![conjr title text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4330fad607e8d300d9da65a7b581aca98a7ebb08.png)

Conjr is an all new enchantment mod with at the moment 5 enchantments with much more planned ahead! (suggestions are welcome)
read more:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Lifesteal (Levels: 1-3) (Sword):
Heals you a portion of your dealt damage.

Blastaway (Levels: 1) (Shield): 
After your shield gets hit three times it blasts back enemies and slighty damages them.

Dash (Levels: 1) (Boots):

Adds a dash/leap ability to get around quicker.

Escapeful (Levels: 1) (Leggings):

When below 5 health it gives you a slight speed boost.

Stagger (Levels: 1-2) (Weapons):
Critical hits slow down enemies for 1.5 seconds.

Hardhat (Levels: 1) (Helmet):
Reduces kinetic damage taken.

Wisdom (Levels: 1-4) (Weapons):
Gives you extra experience every time you kill an entity.

</details>
